agency: U.S. Department of Housing and Urban Development (HUD)
description: Housing Choice Voucher (Section 8) and public housing through NYCHA. Provides rental assistance for low-income families.

eligibility.notes: Income limits are based on Area Median Income (AMI) for NYC metro area, updated annually by HUD. 75% of vouchers must go to extremely low income families (30% AMI). Figures shown are approximate FY2025 values — verify at HUD.
eligibility.waitlist_status: NYCHA Section 8 and public housing waitlists have been CLOSED for several years. Check nyc.gov/nycha for any new openings.

apply_in_person: NYCHA Application Center — check nyc.gov/nycha for current application procedures.
how_to_apply: Apply through NYCHA when the waitlist opens. Monitor nyc.gov/nycha for lottery announcements. Also check NYC Housing Connect for affordable housing lotteries: housingconnect.nyc.gov
citation: 42 USC 1437f (Section 8); 24 CFR 982; NYC Housing Authority Charter
update_frequency: annual (HUD publishes income limits each spring)
